summary: Northvalley website teaser endpoint queues scans through the deployed assessment service and depends on its scan/report status contract.
risk: Assessment API shape or availability changes can break teaser delivery.
recommended_validation: Contract smoke test for POST /api/scans and GET /api/scans/{id} before production release.

summary: People section links Ferosh blog to https://feroshjacob.github.io/posts/.
risk: Blog route changes can create broken public links.
recommended_validation: External-link check for public navigation/profile links.

summary: Staging hostname, Turnstile, and teaser-report gating issues produced reusable validation lessons for central MDE.
risk: Without central import, future repos may repeat staging review and security-provider configuration failures.
recommended_validation: Import outbox lessons into central MDE issue signatures and validator candidates.
